best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-authentication-001 title: successful user authentication module: authentication source pages: 1, 4, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9 preconditions: user is registered in the system. test data: username and password for a valid user. test steps: 1. user enters username and password into the local user interface. 2. local user sends the credentials to the main component. 3. main component requests authentication from the data manager. 4. data manager verifies the credentials and returns a success message. 5. main component confirms authentication to the local user. 6. local user requests data from the main component. 7. main component sends the requested data to the local user. 8. local user processes the data and confirms receipt. 9. local user requests data modification from the main component. 10. main component sends the modified data to the data manager. 11. data manager updates the data and confirms success to the main component. 12. main component confirms the update to the local user. 13. local user requests a report from the main component. 14. main component requests data from the data manager. 15. data manager provides the report data and confirms success to the main component. 16. main component sends the report to the local user. 17. local user deletes the report. 18. local user confirms deletion to the main component. 19. main component confirms the deletion to the local user. expected result: all steps should succeed, and the user should be authenticated and able to perform all actions.

test case id: tc-profile-modification-001 title: successful profile modification module: profile management source pages: 1, 5, 6, 7, 8, 9 preconditions: user is authenticated. test data: updated user profile information. test steps: 1. user updates their profile information in the local user interface. 2. local user sends the updated information to the main component. 3. main component sends the updated information to the data manager. 4. data manager processes the update and confirms success. 5. main component confirms the update to the local user. 6. local user requests a report from the main component. 7. main component requests data from the data manager. 8. data manager provides the report data and confirms success. 9. main component sends the report to the local user. 10. local user deletes the report. 11. local user confirms deletion to the main component. 12. main component confirms the deletion to the local user. expected result: the user profile should be successfully updated, and the user should be able to generate and delete reports.

test case id: tc-report-generation-001 title: successful report generation module: report generation source pages: 1, 7, 8, 9 preconditions: user is authenticated and has valid consumption data. test data: valid consumption data for a user. test steps: 1. user requests a report from the local user interface. 2. local user sends the request to the main component. 3. main component requests data from the data manager. 4. data manager provides the report data and confirms success. 5. main component sends the report to the local user. 6. local user deletes the report. 7. local user confirms deletion to the main component. 8. main component confirms the deletion to the local user. expected result: the report should be generated successfully, and the user should be able to delete it.
